name: KOMAINU

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Empty Vessel
abilities.text: When this model activates, if it is within 1" of another friendly model, this model may gain a Bolstered token.

actions.name: Protective Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally within 1" of this model may gain a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Pounce on Chest
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot be declared if this model is engaged. Place this model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Steelborn Sentinel
triggers.text: Move all other friendly models within (aura)1" of the target up to 3".

extraction_notes: Minion with (2) notation indicates model_limit of 2
